title: Comming Soon
summary: Generalist policies execute cleaning and rearrangement tasks across unseen homes with large visual variation.
body: Tasks include loading dishwashers, sorting laundry, and table reset with language-conditioned goals.
The robot handles room-to-room navigation and recovers from failed grasps autonomously.
Performance remains stable across different floor plans and lighting conditions.
figureAlt: Scenario: Household Assist in Unseen Apartments figure
